# properties

**Instance Property**

The properties of the characteristic.

## Declaration

```swift
var properties: CBCharacteristicProperties { get set }
```

## Discussion

The properties of a characteristic determine the access to and use of the characteristic’s value and descriptors. For a list of the possible values representing the properties of a characteristic, see the [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBCharacteristicProperties] enumeration in [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBCharacteristic]. However, you can’t use the [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBCharacteristicProperties/broadcast] and [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBCharacteristicProperties/extendedProperties] characteristic properties when creating a mutable characteristic.

## Managing a Mutable Characteristic

- **value**: The value of the characteristic.
- **descriptors**: An array of the characteristic’s descriptors.
- **permissions**: The permissions of the characteristic value.
- **CBAttributePermissions**: Values that represent the read, write, and encryption permissions for a characteristic’s value.
- **subscribedCentrals**: A list of centrals that are currently subscribed to the characteristic’s value.
